sglang.title: Minor fix in compiler & format
sglang.author: ZackZeng999
sglang.bodyExcerpt: #532 I fixed this issue and some problems in test/srt/model

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Support `eos_token_id` from `config.json`
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: While working on BLIP-2 in #5920, I found that the model kept repeating the output in a fashion similar to Llama 3 when it was first released. It turns out that this is because vLLM failed to consider the extra EOS token (\n) which is only specified in config.json rather than generation_config.json

vllm.title: [Core] Optimize `SequenceStatus.is_finished` by switching to IntEnum
vllm.author: Yard1
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This is a small performance tweak - we call SequenceStatus.is_finished very often, and each time we used to create a list. By switching to an IntEnum, we can do a simple is greater comparison, speeding things up.



 PR Checklist (Click to Expand) 
Thank you for your contribution to vLLM! Before sub

vllm.title: [Kernel] Raise an exception in MoE kernel if the batch size is larger then 65k
vllm.author: comaniac
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
See #5938 for details.
This PR raises an exception in the MoE kernel when the batch size is too large, which likely causes illegal memory access.

Follow-up to #5880

vllm.title: [ CI/Build ] LM Eval Harness Based CI Testing
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
SUMMARY:

Adds lm-eval harness based testing, using GSM-8k
Scripts to create baseline scores offline
Scripts to run lm-eval integration tests
Configs for large and small models

USAGE:
pip install git+https://github.com/EleutherAI/lm-evaluation-harness.git@262f879a06aa5de869e5dd951d0ff2cf2f9ba380
pi

vllm.title: [Bugfix][CI/Build][Hardware][AMD] Install matching torchvision to fix AMD tests
vllm.author: mawong-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
PR #5908 installs transformers >= 4.42.0 for Gemma-2 support. This broke the AMD container and all AMD tests because certain torchvision features are used that are not yet supported by the container's version of torchvision.
This PR resolves the issue by installing a matching updated version of torc

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Temporarily Remove Phi3-Vision from TP Test
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt: #5892 introduced TP test for vision language models, but for some reason (to be further investigated), the MP test has been failing for Phi3-Vision on the main branch even though it has passed on the original PR. This PR temporarily removes this model out of the TP test in order to unblock other CI

vllm.title: [CI/Build] Reuse code for checking output consistency
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: This PR factors out common code for comparing HuggingFace vs. vLLM model outputs, making it easier to add new e2e tests.

vllm.title: [CI/Build] [3/3] Reorganize entrypoints tests
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
To better preserve Git history, I'm splitting this process into multiple PRs.
Step 1: Split out Chat API tests to another file (#5526)
Step 2: Split out Completion API tests to another file (#5904)
Step 3: Move OpenAI tests to openai directory, and LLM tests to llm directory.
